reviews.review_description:
If you like object shows, gtag, or anything similar, this is a great game!
You can avoid the lava with parkour in one of the maps, or you can do roleplay! it has alot of cosmetics that u can wear!
Also im a mod, Content Creator, and possibly a future community manager!

One of my favorite VR games cause of 5 reasons

1. Fun mods

2. Fun owner

3. Fun maps

4. Cool cosmetics

5. Cheeseburger

Good game but for some reason it puts  my right controller in the air. My right controller has water damage due to my fish tank and doesn't work any more, and with other games that has the same movement set I don't have problems with except this one. Idk if you can fix this but if you can please do. Otherwise good start. :)

This game has many cosmetics the community is great you almost can NEVER find toxic people (I’ve never found one) and there are many maps this game one of few I’ve ever played that feels normal playing alone

Very nice community, the owner is cool, and overall the game itself is just awesome. It’s a bit quiet at times, but that’s just because people get on at different times. Gotta say tho, they really have to add back the 2026 cosmetics for a bit…

ALSO THE APRIL FOOLS UPDATE ISNT PERMANENT HE CAN SWAP IT BACK AT ANY TIME
At the premiere of yos 3 (an object show) broke and was really laggy even though there were 20 player lobby’s. But besides that its pretty decent

developer_response.body: I mean, the game cannot handle more than 40 people trying to hop in at the game at once. It's a bit obvious, especially if the game is made by one person, it's going to have some errors, but I am glad that you understand this and that you like the game!

developer_response.body: Oopsie! I will be fixing that, thanks for letting me know. Bug fix will be releasing in a couple of hours

reviews.review_description:
First of all, there’s TONS of content. For example, 
Achievements - all unique in their own way! 
Challenges - Parkour maps & unlockable cosmetics! 
 Cosmetics - Over 300 of them! 
and etc! 

Also the amazing community that upholds this amazing game.

(Also buy my hat in shop!! Objext’s Tophat LOL)

It’s a really good game but the community is horrible. I was having fun but then two of these kids joins ones a girl the other is a boy, the girl had depression or something I’m worried about her, btw she sounds like a 6 years old and, she was saying some dark topics while the boy is being so toxic I mean by toxic like so rude. Then when girl left, then boy started saying some horrible things to me and, saying things that I didn’t even say some minutes came by the boy raged quit. I can’t describe this game community it’s bad and, I hope that girl is ok because I’m so worried that I wanna talk to her problems and, try to make her happy. I was new btw so this was my new experience and, this was the craziest experience of my VR life I recommend to not talk to the people in this game.

developer_response.body: Hey sorry if that happened to you, if you remember the boy's name or just want to report this in general there is a discord you can join in miglele's youtube channel. But please don't let these two people be the reason why you gave the game a 1 star review, please change it if you were able to I would really appreciate it! ,:)

reviews.review_description: VROS is a fun and really cool game! The game is really fun, and the cosmetics are really creative. The collabs are also amazing, like wdym I can wear my friend SuperMayrio on my head while doing obbys?

when i joined, i expected like a gameshow game where u join a lobby and do challenges with ppl, but what i got was still nice, the players are really nice, theres many secrets to explore, and i loved all the object show references, it was also funny having my arms detached from my body lol, overall recommend playing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! You can't still host gameshows or play around the game if you would like, there are limitless possibilities on how you can enjoy the game!

reviews.review_title: This game is absolutely buns yo
reviews.review_description: The 5 star reviews are paid or smth gng

developer_response.body:
You’ve probably seen the April Fools update for the game, which is why you think it’s a bit off. We changed the entire game to fit the event, but it’ll be back to normal after April 1st, so no worries!
If you want to play the normal version of the game, go to the App Library, click on the three dots in the VR Object Show app. Then go to settings > release channels, and switch the channel from Production (Store) to RC. Then the game will return back to normal while you can still play with those in the April Fools version of the game!
Please let me know if you have any more questions and contact me at @miglele on discord. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I’m a content creator for this game, but my rating isn’t rigged because of that.













This game is genuinely fun. The host is kind, the moderators are kind, and there’s not a bunch of 5 year olds screaming slurs every 10 seconds. The community is surprisingly kind and supportive! Awesome game. Keep up the good work miglele!

The game doesn’t look vary good and personally not vary fun.

No hate BTW

developer_response.body: If you have suggestions for how we can improve my game, feel free to join our Discord and share what you’d like to see changed! Feedback is highly appreciated, and I’m always working to make the game enjoyable for everyone, though being a solo developer isn’t always easy, hehe!

developer_response.body: Limited-time cosmetics return every now and then, so be sure to check the in-game update board and official announcements from me (Miglele) or on the Discord server to know when they’re available again! Hope this helps!
